headline: Bath & Body Works Bets On Hilary Duff, Ulta To Reverse Its Slide
summary: Facing falling sales, the retailer is pairing a splashy celebrity campaign with retail expansion to win younger shoppers.

raw.headline: Bath & Body Works Bets On Hilary Duff, Ulta To Reverse Its Slide
raw.summary: Facing falling sales, the retailer is pairing a splashy celebrity campaign with retail expansion to win younger shoppers.

headline: 2 Reasons to Like ULTA (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: The past six months haven’t been great for Ulta. It just made a new 52-week low of $454, and shareholders have lost 30.9% of their capital. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

raw.headline: 2 Reasons to Like ULTA (and 1 Not So Much)
raw.summary: The past six months haven’t been great for Ulta. It just made a new 52-week low of $454, and shareholders have lost 30.9% of their capital. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Ulta Beauty's International Expansion: Next Growth Frontier?
summary: ULTA is expanding internationally through new stores and growing overseas businesses to support long-term growth.

raw.headline: Ulta Beauty's International Expansion: Next Growth Frontier?
raw.summary: ULTA is expanding internationally through new stores and growing overseas businesses to support long-term growth.

headline: Bath & Body Works Shares Fall After Goldman Sachs Downgrade (BBWI)
summary: Bath & Body Works (NYSE:BBWI) shares dropped 4. 1% in pre-market trading on Wednesday after Goldman Sachs downgraded the specialty retailer to Sell, citing concerns over weakening consumer sentiment, brand perception and the risks associated with its evolving distribution strategy.

raw.headline: Bath & Body Works Shares Fall After Goldman Sachs Downgrade (BBWI)
